examples: His secretary acts as a gatekeeper, reading all mail before it reaches her boss.
The gatekeeper says that he cannot grant him entry at the moment.
Her job was to serve as a gatekeeper, a human shield for the technicians.
Because they can afford to pay the gatekeeper a hefty fee for recommending the product.
Our investigations have shown a corrupt consultant gatekeeper can cost fund 10-15% over time.
